content:
graph TD subgraph "Degradation Vectors Comparison" A["Thermal Only
(No UV, No Humidity)"] B["Moisture Only
(Humidity Absorption)"] C["Combined Damp Heat
(85°C / 85% RH)"] end subgraph "Mechanism [REF:1]" A -->|"Increases chemical
reaction rate"| D["Interfacial
Degradation"] B -->|"Water diffusion
into adhesive"| D C -->|"Synergistic:
rate + diffusion"| E["Accelerated
Joint Failure"] end subgraph "Evidence" F["Encapsulant-Substrate
Interface [REF:2]"] -->|"Significant degradation
even without UV/humidity"| A G["7 Adhesive Systems
5,000 Thermocycles [REF:3]"] -->|"Significant decrease
in bond strength"| D H["One-Step Self-Etch
[REF:3]"] -->|"Lowest post-aging
bond strength"| D end subgraph "Material Dependence [REF:3]" I["Adhesive Chemistry A"] -->|"Higher retention"| J["Bond Strength
After Aging"] K["Adhesive Chemistry B"] -->|"Lower retention"| J L["One-Step Self-Etch"] -->|"Worst retention"| J end subgraph "DVS-PEI Evidence Gap" M["Moisture Diffusion
Coefficients"] --- N["NOT ESTABLISHED"] O["Activation Energies
for Hydrolysis"] --- N P["Reversible vs
Irreversible Threshold"] --- N end style E fill:#ff6b6b,stroke:#333,color:#fff style N fill:#ffa94d,stroke:#333,color:#fff style D fill:#ffd43b,stroke:#333 style J fill:#69db7c,stroke:#333
